judgeScores.justification: Excellent execution with consistent lowercase naming and intuitive grouping by type→domain→context (e.g., documents/projects/project_alpha). The photo organization by year plus functional subfolders (graphics, screenshots) is particularly thoughtful. Minor nitpick: splitting .ts and .tsx into separate folders separates related React code (hooks vs components), though this follows file-extension logic. Nesting depth stays within the 2-3 level guideline perfectly, and all 80 files are accounted for with a clear, comprehensive MANIFEST.
